title: Understanding Corporate Law in Nepal: A Practical Guide
excerpt: Nepal's corporate legal framework has evolved significantly over the last decade. This guide walks business owners through key regulations and best practices.

title: Your Rights During a Criminal Investigation
excerpt: Being questioned by authorities can be overwhelming. Knowing your fundamental rights under Nepali law can make a critical difference in the outcome.

title: Property Disputes in Nepal: How to Protect Your Interests
excerpt: Land and property disputes are among the most common civil cases in Nepal. We explore the legal channels available to you.
